result.stderr:
dotnet-to-zod 0.1.0-Beta1+00222bece
Peter Morris

  -s, --suffix                  (Default: morris.zod.ts) Suffix to use at end of
                                generated files. Also used when
                                delete-mode=suffix.

  --delete-files-suffixes       Semi-colon list of file suffixes to delete
                                before generating source. Used instead of
                                --suffix when --delete-mode=suffix.

  --help                        Display this help screen.

  --version                     Display version information.

  Assembly (pos. 0)             Required. Assembly file to convert.

  destinationFolder (pos. 1)    Required. Destination folder.
